title: Sweet Violence
writer: Jacques Aucante, Grisha Dabat, Max Pécas
actors: Pierre Brice, Elke Sommer, Vittoria Prada
plot: Olivier, a handsome but callow and moody young student, picks up an enthusiastic actress during a theatre rehearsal, and is introduced to her acquaintances -- a group of jaded rich kids who spend their time storming around the Riv...
